title: 0.1g-1000g Digital Scales Kitchen Scales Digital Pocket Scales Portable Weighing Scales Food Scale Jewellery Scales Back-lit LCD Display Battery
features: What You'll Get: Get ready for precise measurements with our 0.1g to 1000g Digital Scale. It's accurate, portable, and versatile. This scale makes weighing easy and empowers you to handle any task.
High Precision Scale: Unveil precision in every measurement with our cutting-edge digital scale. Whether it's food, jewellery, coffee, or more, this sleek device guarantees accurate readings.
Multiple Weight Options: This pocket scale offers six different weight options which are including g/ct/oz/ozt/DWT/tl. Crafted for durability, it's a versatile companion for various weighing needs.

Calibration: Our mini professional scale features an automatic calibration option for pinpoint accuracy. To ensure precise measurements, allow a 30-second warm-up time. Caution: overloading might harm the internal sensor.

Capacity: From 0.1g to a maximum of 1000g, this lightweight scale is perfect for portable use. It serves as an ideal weighing tool for gold, silver, coins, jewellery, gemstones, and spices. Its features include an LCD display and a robust stainless-steel platform.
description: Discover precision in every measurement with our state-of-the-art digital scale . Whether you're weighing food, jewelry, coffee , or anything else, this elegant device ensures accurate readings . This pocket scale provides a choice of six different weight units , including g/ct/oz/ozt/DWT/tl . Designed for durability , it's a versatile companion for a wide range of weighing requirements. Our compact professional scale boasts an automatic calibration feature for pinpoint accuracy . To ensure exact measurements, please allow a 30-second warm-up time . Caution: overloading may cause damage to the internal sensor.
